issue_summary: CachingTokenFilter.reset() propagates to input if not cached
javadoc_before:
/** * Rewinds the iterator to the beginning of the cached list. *

* Note that this does not call reset() on the wrapped tokenstream ever, even * the first time. You should reset() the inner tokenstream before wrapping * it with CachingTokenFilter. */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Propagates reset if incrementToken has not yet been called. Otherwise
   * it rewinds the iterator to the beginning of the cached list.
   */
